pageContext.name: Enmu (Shake the Sword Burn Your Heart)
pageContext.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Enmu (Shake the Sword Burn Your Heart) Statue!  This statue is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Enmu from Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba-Mugen. Standing at approximately 4.7' tall, Enmu is seen striking his otherwordly pose.  Demon Slayer fans, be sure to enhance your anime figure collection with the Enmu statue today!
